name: Coca-Cola Scholars Program

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen, permanent resident, or temporary resident
eligibility.other_requirements: Must be attending high school in the U.S. and plan to pursue undergraduate degree; strong community leadership and service required

stackable_notes: Generally stackable with institutional aid; some colleges may count it as external scholarship income and reduce need-based grants accordingly — check institutional policy.
notes: Emphasizes character and leadership over pure academics — a 4.0 GPA without significant community impact rarely wins. 150 scholars selected from ~100,000+ applicants annually. The alumni network (Coca-Cola Scholars Community) provides ongoing mentorship and professional development value beyond the dollar amount.
